text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "BP 120/75, HR 115, Sat 97%, on room air T 38.1°C Cardiac examination: normal, rhythmic, tachycardic tones Pulmonary examination: vesicular breath sounds present in all fields, clear bases, no additional sounds Abdominal examination: abdomen palpable, painful and tender on the right side, Murphy +, Blumberg -.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Right Giordano + Otoscopy: Right: canal poorly assessable due to the presence of a cerumen plug.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Left: patent ear canal, slightly erythematous, intact tympanic membrane.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Reports no otorrhea Edematous and erythematous palatine tonsils, with evidence of purulent plaques", 0.0, 0.5)
